title: polygala patens
intro: Polygala patens, also known as purple milkwort, is a flowering plant native to North America. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, including its ability to support the immune system and act as an anti-inflammatory agent. The health benefits of Polygala patens include its potential to help manage stress and anxiety, improve sleep quality, and boost the body's natural defenses against illness. The plant is often prepared as a tea or tincture, and can also be found in supplement form, allowing individuals to harness its potential health benefits.
